channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: France vs Paraguay LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16
item.description: Live coverage and text commentary stream updates as Mbappe's France face Paraguay in the Round of 16 knockout game.

item.title: Police clash with protesters outside AfD meeting
item.description: German police scuffled with protesters as the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) held its national convention

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Best Round of 16 knockout matches to watch
item.description: As the tournament enters the second knockout phase, there are several blockbuster matchups led by Spain-Portugal.

item.title: At least 7 Palestinians killed by Israeli forces over past 48 hours in Gaza
item.description: A further nine bodies were recovered from under the rubble, according to Gaza's Ministry of Health.

item.title: Iran promotes message of continuity and revenge at Khamenei commemoration
item.description: Iran will be shut down on Sunday and Monday to encourage more mourners to join funeral procession.

item.title: Russian attacks leave trail of destruction across Ukraine
item.description: Russian attacks leave trail of destruction across Ukraine

item.title: Canada vs Morocco LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as cohosts Canada play Morocco in the round of 16 knockout stage.

item.title: Brain drain leaves Yemen’s health sector in tatters and millions helpless
item.description: Yemen's health professionals have been leaving the country in search of higher income and a safer working environment.

item.title: Why closure matters at the end of life
item.description: A peaceful, supported end-of-life experience — focused on family and closure — can transform both dying and grieving.

item.title: Nabatieh recovery begins amid ongoing southern Lebanon tensions
item.description: Nabatieh recovery begins amid ongoing southern Lebanon tensions

item.title: Pope Leo urges migrant protection, integration on visit to Lampedusa
item.description: Pontiff urges people in Europe and US to welcome and assist migrants during symbolic trip to Italy’s frontier island.

item.title: Firefighters race to contain flames in northeastern Spain
item.description: Firefighters race to contain flames in northeastern Spain

item.title: England vs Mexico at Azteca: Kickoff, altitude and weather explained
item.description: The pitch at the Azteca is 2,240 metres above sea level. At that altitude, air is thinner and makes breathing difficult.

item.title: Thousands protest in Germany as far-right AfD party meets
item.description: Protesters from unions, civil society and left-wing parties aim to disrupt AfD annual conference in Erfurt.

item.title: America250: How the US heatwave will affect Fourth of July celebrations
item.description: From Washington to LA, how plans to mark the United States' 250th anniversary could be disrupted by extreme heat.

item.title: In South Asia, America has stopped asking India for permission
item.description: Washington has started dealing with regional players without regard for Indian interests.

item.title: Ukraine hits oil and military facilities near Russia’s St Petersburg
item.description: Kyiv's drones disrupt St Petersburg internet and flights as Russian strikes halt a gas facility in central Ukraine.

item.title: Millions mourn Iran’s Ali Khamenei amid historic funeral procession
item.description: Mourners pack Tehran streets for Khamenei’s funeral, with ceremonies spanning cities and ending in Mashhad burial.

item.title: Russia claims it captured the strategic key Ukrainian city of Kostiantynivk
item.description: Russia claims it captured the strategic key Ukrainian city of Kostiantynivka

item.title: Cape Verde fans overjoyed with team’s World Cup run despite Argentina loss
item.description: Tiny island nation's colossal performance against reigning world champions leaves supporters feeling incredibly proud.

item.title: Thousands gather as Khamenei funeral ceremonies open in Tehran
item.description: Thousands of mourners attended the public grand procession of Iran’s late Supreme Leader Khamenei in Tehran.

item.title: Mali’s army says rebels launch new attacks on towns and cities
item.description: Tuareg-led armed ⁠group says it attacked northern town where Malian troops and Russian fighters are based.

item.title: Saudi-led coalition pledges ‘unprecedented’ force against Houthi threats
item.description: Threats escalate after Houthis block Saudi warplanes, allowing Iranian plane to land in Sanaa for first time in decade.

item.title: Key takeaways from Round of 32 stage at World Cup 2026
item.description: A thrilling Golden Boot race hots up, France in scintillating form, and Messi and Argentina squeak past Cape Verde.

item.title: Cape Verde fans celebrate history despite loss
item.description: Cape Verde fans celebrate history despite loss
